name: Chimicuurri Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar, olive oil, and dry mustard in a food processor.
2. Process until well blended.
3. Add the remaining ingredients one at a time, processing after each addition until well combined.
4. Cover and let stand for 4-8 hours, allowing flavors to meld.
Alternatively, cover and chill up to 96 hours.
5. Serve chilled or at room temperature as a dipping sauce.
